branches.label: HAPPY
branches.draftBodyPreview:
Hello Auditor proof HAPPY-AUDITOR-PROOF-1775492131674,

Thank you so much—I'm thrilled you're leaning in this direction!

I'm happy to confirm: the **Elite collection** is indeed available for your December 2026 celebration in Tuscany. When the contract reflects this collection, the **30% retainer** holds your date, and **engagement travel within 50 miles of Florence is included** as part of the package.

If you're ready to move forward this week, I'll prepare the contract for signature and send over the secure payment link. Once we receive both the signed agreement and the retainer, your date is officially reserved.

Please let me know if you have any other questions—I'm here to make this seamless.

Warmly,
[Studio Manager]

branches.label: FAILURE
branches.draftBodyPreview:
Thank you so much for your message—it's wonderful to hear you're ready to move forward!

I want to make sure we get every detail exactly right for you. You mentioned the option you're considering and a few specifics around the deposit and travel for your engagement session near Florence. Because our contract terms—including the precise retainer percentage and travel inclusions for destination weddings in Tuscany—are tailored to each booking, I'd like to confirm those exact figures directly from your signed agreement or have our team pull the finalized terms we discussed.

What I can tell you is that we're absolutely thrilled about your December 2026 celebration in Tuscany, and we're here to make the booking process as seamless as possible. If you're ready to move ahead this week, I'll send over the contract with all confirmed terms—retainer, travel logistics, and session details—so there's no ambiguity.

Could you let me know if you'd like me to email the contract now, or if you'd prefer a quick call to walk through everything together? I'm here to help however works best for you.

Warmly,
[Studio Manager]
